body_txt: A person with a huge imagination, who spends most of the time in their own imaginary world, frequently out of touch with reality. Often the main character, and usually a Cheerful Child and/or a Cloudcuckoolander . A show with them has lots of imagination sequences (which they may or may not act out ), maybe also dream ones . May have an Imaginary Friend . In many (but not all) instances, the imaginative character is a Reality Warper , and their odd daydreams can temporarily become real . Contrast Lack of Imagination , for someone who can't imagine very well. In Anime Fan Speak this is one of the symptoms of " Chuunibyou ", and the most famous. You might have been looking for Love, Chunibyo & Other Delusions! and also the trope itself .
